D5 Design L6 Create Reference

Palette Code Exporter

build a tonal scale in OKLCH, then read it out as Tailwind, CSS custom properties, or JSON tokens

A design palette is only useful once it leaves the colour picker. Generate a 50-900 tonal ramp from one hue in OKLCH — evenly stepped in lightness — and export it in the shape your toolchain expects: a Tailwind colour object, a block of CSS variables, or a JSON token set.

Set the brand hue and chroma; the ramp updates and the code panel re-emits in the chosen format. Every step is computed in OKLCH so the lightness progression is perceptually even, not arithmetic in sRGB.
